generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor collecting input current data from the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, MontiArcAutomaton
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, MontiArcAutomaton
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, Cpp
]

instance Motor1 : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SiemensController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller managing servo control loops"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission for mechanical reduction in the first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear for mechanical reduction in the first axis"
]

instance IndustrialRoboticsEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial robotics operational domain for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    base:contains Motor1, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, SiemensController
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based MBSE methodology for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for modeling joint friction to optimize robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

]

]

]

instance MechanicalComponentStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance UserInterfaceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized system performance data for operator interaction"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated by comparing simulated data against measured physical system data, where deviation serves as the primary validation metric. The system addresses inaccuracies in robot motion through continuous calibration, as specified in the solution scope to improve overall motion accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for sensor data transmission; no details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols are specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17] for systems engineering modeling, ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26] for architecture description languages, and SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) [17,27], facilitating interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders and systems [31]."
]
